c.d: The app's ability to send messages to multiple contacts simultaneously, including features like group chats, channels, or broadcast lists.
The range of platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.) on which the app is available, affecting accessibility for different users.
The level of security and privacy features offered by the app, such as end-to-end encryption and data protection measures.
The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and potential reach.
The cost associated with using the app, including any subscription fees or in-app purchases.
